concepts_used.title: 元胞自动机
concepts_used.how_used: 使用元胞自动机模拟蒲公英种子在二维网格上的扩散，每个元胞代表一个区域，状态包括空、生长、成熟等，根据气候因素更新状态。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We utilize the Cellular Automata concept and simulate the dispersion of three invasive plants in 14 locations.

concepts_used.title: 网络分析法（ANP）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用网络分析法（ANP）确定入侵植物影响因子的指标权重，考虑指标之间的相互依赖关系。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We use the Analytic Network Process and Technique for Order Preference by Similarity to Ideal Solution (or TOPSIS) to estimate accessing factors.

concepts_used.title: TOPSIS 法
concepts_used.how_used: 使用TOPSIS方法综合多个指标计算入侵植物的影响因子，通过正负理想解的距离确定得分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We use the Analytic Network Process and Technique for Order Preference by Similarity to Ideal Solution (or TOPSIS) to estimate accessing factors.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对模型进行灵敏度分析，展示气候因素对蒲公英扩散结果的影响依赖性和相关性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The sensitivity analysis shows clear dependency and correlation of climate effects based on our model.

concepts_used.title: 缺失值处理
concepts_used.how_used: 对缺失的时间序列数据使用已有数据的均值进行插补，对无效的标量数据使用其他地点的均值插补。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: If some values are absent in time-series data, they are imputed by the average of presence values. If a scalar variable is invalid for a location, the value is imputed using the average value of other locations.

concepts_used.title: 流程图绘制规范
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图展示整个研究的工作流程，包括数据获取、模型构建、结果分析等步骤。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The workflow of our work is illustrated in Fig. 1.1.

concepts_used.title: 数据查找渠道
concepts_used.how_used: 从Google Earth Engine获取气候、地理和生物多样性数据，包括温度、湿度、太阳辐射、pH值等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We extract various climate, geography, and biodiversity data from the Google Earth Engine.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出5条模型假设，包括地面平坦、一年期起始时间限制、种子传播时间忽略、高降水时种子传播暂停、其他植物参数与蒲公英相同。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption & Justification 1. The investigated open land is assumed to be perfectly flat. ... Assumption & Justification 5. Effects of influential variables on other plants considered in this context are the same as those on dandelions if they are not found in the literature.
